The '''thernbee''' was a large, [[Color/Legends|white]]-haired, [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]] creature with psychic powers. Thernbees communicated in psychic visions. They lived in the mountains of [[Almania]].

Their hair fell out constantly leaving their coats patchy, and exposing pink skin. <!-- Scientists think this is because of industrial chemicals on its home planet. (This paragraph needs work. This appears to be based on the Thernbee Luke met in The New Rebellion that was a half starved and caged.) -->

They were a playful species, sometimes toying sadistically with their prey before ultimately killing it. Their saliva was also an [[Anesthetic/Legends|anesthetic]] that numbed their victim's senses. They were omnivorous and ate small animals, plants, and fruits.

[[Kueller]] owned a few of these creatures, and one ate a [[Ysalamiri/Legends|ysalamir]] as it was emitting a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] bubble.

Kueller also put [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in a cage with a thernbee. The thernbee actually helped Luke with the injuries he had suffered when his [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] exploded using the anesthetic it naturally produced in its saliva. The thernbee communicated with Luke using its psychic powers devising a way to escape. They did so, but not before being confronted by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] guards. The thernbee quickly disposed of the guards and it and Luke separated.

{{Creature-stub}}
